title: Chuck Paul
compiled_truth: Chuck Paul is an external contact at [A-closer-look](companies/a-closer-look). Over the corpus period (2000-04-07 to 2001-09-28), Chuck Paul sent 14 and received 62 emails, totalling 76 interactions. Top correspondents: [Smu-Betas](people/smu-betas-yahoogroups) (7), [Jskilli](people/jskilli) (5), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (2), [Ksubach](people/ksubach-afce) (1), [Kirkw77](people/kirkw77-aol) (1).
